title: Rhaphidorhynchus stylosus
intro: There is not enough information about Rhaphidorhynchus stylosus.
taxonomy: Rhaphidorhynchus stylosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the order Lamiales and is classified within the class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledonous plants. Further, Rhaphidorhynchus stylosus is a member of the order Lamiales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes mint and sesame. At the family level, Rhaphidorhynchus stylosus is classified as a member of the Gesneriaceae family, which comprises over 3,000 species. The full classification of Rhaphidorhynchus stylosus includes its kingdom placement as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
